title: Reaching the end-user with biomass vending machines
description: A practice abstract detailing the use of biomass vending machines for direct sales of wood pellets and firewood, allowing farmers to automate retail and retain more added value within the producing farm. It compares solutions from Italian providers Pellet Drive and DAB, outlining technical features, deployment in regions like Basilicata and Lombardy, and implications for boosting rural bioeconomy networks.
